/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -g -O0 "CMakeFiles/kvdb-server.dir/src/server/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kvdb-server.dir/src/server/server.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kvdb-server.dir/src/server/connection_handler.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kvdb-server.dir/src/core/lock_manager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kvdb-server.dir/src/core/transaction_manager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kvdb-server.dir/src/core/store.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kvdb-server.dir/src/protocol/parser.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/kvdb-server.dir/src/protocol/protocol.cpp.o" -o kvdb-server
